benefits_headline: Why Men Who Know PrimePulse Male Are Now Choosing Primal TRT
benefits_paragraphs: If you've been researching PrimePulse Male, you already understand what matters: natural testosterone support, male vitality, and proven ingredients. That's the right instinct.

What thousands of men have discovered is that male vitality support can be simpler and more straightforward. The same core principles you were looking for — energy, stamina, and confidence — delivered with a cleaner formula that's easy to understand and trust.

Primal TRT is what men find when they want proven results without the complex narratives. Familiar, research-backed ingredients that support your body's natural testosterone production and overall male wellness.

faq_items.question: Is Primal TRT safe to use?
faq_items.answer: Primal TRT is made with natural ingredients and produced under strict quality standards. It is designed to support energy, performance, and overall wellness. If you have any medical condition or are taking medication, consult a healthcare professional before use.

faq_items.question: How should I take Primal TRT?
faq_items.answer: Follow the recommended daily serving as part of your routine for best results. Consistent use helps maintain steady energy, performance, and long-term vitality.

faq_items.question: What if I'm not satisfied with my purchase?
faq_items.answer: Your purchase is protected by a 60-day money-back guarantee. If you are not satisfied, you can request a refund within 60 days through a quick and simple process.

faq_items.question: Is this a subscription or recurring charge?
faq_items.answer: No, this is a one-time purchase with no subscriptions or recurring billing.

faq_items.question: How does Primal TRT compare to PrimePulse Male?
faq_items.answer: Both products address male vitality and testosterone support. Primal TRT was formulated with a more straightforward, proven approach using familiar ingredients like Tongkat Ali, Maca, and L-Arginine. We encourage you to review both and choose what's right for you.

faq_items.question: I've tried PrimePulse Male before. Will Primal TRT work differently?
faq_items.answer: Primal TRT uses a comprehensive approach to support natural testosterone production and male vitality. Many customers who had tried other supplements in this category found improved energy and stamina within the first few weeks. As with any supplement, results vary — which is why we back every order with a 60-day money-back guarantee.

faq_items.question: Why is the 6 bottle package recommended?
faq_items.answer: The 6-bottle package provides the best value and ensures consistent use, helping Primal TRT support long-term results while maximizing savings.

faq_items.question: How long does shipping take?
faq_items.answer: Standard shipping typically takes 5-7 business days within the United States. Expedited shipping options are available at checkout.

modals.title: Privacy Policy
modals.intro: Last updated: March 2026. This Privacy Policy describes how Primal TRT and its authorized distributors collect, use, and protect your personal information.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect personal information that you provide directly to us when you place an order, create an account, or contact customer support. This includes your name, email address, shipping address, billing address, phone number, and payment information.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the information we collect to process and fulfill your orders, provide customer support, send order confirmations and shipping updates, and improve our website and services. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

sections.heading: Cookies and Tracking
sections.content: Our website uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience and analyze website traffic. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

sections.heading: Data Security
sections.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

sections.heading: Your Rights (CCPA & GDPR)
sections.content: Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You may also opt out of marketing communications at any time.

sections.heading: Contact Information
sections.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@primaltrt.com or call 1-800-795-3275.

modals.title: Terms of Service
modals.intro: Last updated: March 2026. By accessing this website and purchasing any products, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

sections.heading: Agreement to Terms
sections.content: By using this website, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.

sections.heading: Product Disclaimer
sections.content: Primal TRT is a dietary supplement designed for adult men. Follow all instructions on the product label. Results may vary based on individual circumstances.

sections.heading: Age Restriction
sections.content: You must be at least 18 years of age to purchase products from this website. By placing an order, you represent and warrant that you are at least 18 years old.

sections.heading: Independent Distributor
sections.content: This website is operated by an independent authorized distributor of Primal TRT. We are not the manufacturer or brand owner. PrimePulse Male is a registered trademark of its respective owner. We are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by PrimePulse Male.

sections.heading: Order Acceptance
sections.content: We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order for any reason. All prices are subject to change without notice.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties. In no event shall our liability exceed the purchase price paid for the product.

sections.heading: Governing Law
sections.content: These Terms shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.content: For questions about these Terms, please contact support@primaltrt.com or call 1-800-795-3275.

modals.title: Returns & Refunds
modals.intro: We offer a 60-day money-back guarantee on all Primal TRT orders.

sections.heading: 60-Day Money-Back Guarantee
sections.content: If for any reason you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, you may return the product(s) within 60 days from the date of delivery for a full refund. No questions asked.

sections.heading: How to Initiate a Return
sections.content: To request a return and refund, please contact our customer support team at support@primaltrt.com with your order number. Our support team will respond within 1-2 business days with return instructions.

sections.heading: Refund Processing
sections.content: Refunds are typically processed within 5-10 business days after we receive your returned product. The refund will be credited to your original payment method.

sections.heading: Damaged or Defective Products
sections.content: If you receive a damaged or defective product, please contact us immediately with photos of the damaged item and packaging. We will arrange for a free replacement or full refund.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.content: For returns and refund requests, please contact support@primaltrt.com or call 1-800-795-3275 (Monday-Friday, 9AM-5PM EST).
